picks.name: 사자심왕 기사
picks.effect: When applying any control status, additionally reduces the controlled target's 21-30% Attack. (This effect lasts for 10 seconds)

picks.name: 십자군
picks.effect: After accumulating damage equal to 70-52% of max HP, immediately gains 2 [Defense Stat Buffs].

picks.name: 복수자
picks.effect: When dealing Damage, additionally inflicts [Adaptive Damage] equal to 4.5-8.1% of the bearer's Max HP. (The bearer's Physical and Magical Defense, as well as Damage Reduction, are reduced by 10% in battle) (DoT damage cannot trigger this effect)
